name: backend-api
description: Como adicionar e modificar endpoints da API Express

adding_new_feature.step_1_create_schema: Criar schema Zod em server/schemas/ (ex: myFeature.ts)

controller_conventions.imports: import type { RequestHandler } from 'express'; import { db } from '../models/db.js'; import { AppError } from '../middleware/errorHandler.js';
controller_conventions.pattern: export const actionName: RequestHandler = (req, res, next) => { try { ... } catch (e) { next(e); } }
controller_conventions.access_body: req.body (já validado pelo Zod se usou validateBody)

route_conventions.import: import { Router } from 'express'; import * as controller from '../controllers/file.js'; import { authenticate } from '../middleware/authenticate.js';
route_conventions.global_auth: router.use(authenticate) — se todas as rotas precisam de auth

service_layer.when_to_use: Quando a lógica é complexa ou reutilizável entre controllers (ex: aiService, authService, stripeService)
service_layer.pattern: Importar e chamar no controller: const result = await service.method(data)
